tool_input.command: cat /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f's{i+1}: {s[\"title\"]}') for i,s in enumerate(d.get('sections',[]))]"
tool_input.description: List sections in universal-dao knowledge file

tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for i, s in enumerate(d.get('sections', [])):
    print(f's{i+1}: {s[\"title\"]}')
"
tool_input.description: List sections in universal-dao knowledge file

tool_input.command: KNOWLEDGE_DIR=/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work4/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge && echo "exists: $(ls $KNOWLEDGE_DIR/javadoc/javadoc-nablarch-common-dao-UniversalDao.json)" && jq -r --arg sec "s17" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else $s.title end' "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR/javadoc/javadoc-nablarch-common-dao-UniversalDao.json"
